data.title: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke by phone with the Iranian President to discuss ensuring the safe passage of oil tankers.
data.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke by phone with Iranian President Sergei Peskov to discuss the “serious situation in the region.” India is currently seeking ways to ensure the safe passage of oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. Modi posted on the X platform that he was “deeply concerned about the escalating tensions, civilian casualties, and damage to civilian infrastructure,” adding that “the safety and security of Indian citizens, and ensuring the unimpeded passage of goods and energy, remain India’s top priorities.” He did not specifically mention maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. (Jinshi)

data.title: China's Energy Giant Highlights Niche Credit Market Opportunity
data.description: A Chinese energy-construction giant is drawing attention to a lesser-known segment of the credit markets. Bloomberg posted on X that investors are exploring a technicality that could potentially more than double their fixed-income returns. This development underscores the complexities and opportunities within niche financial sectors, as market participants look for innovative ways to enhance their investment strategies. The focus on this arcane corner of the credit markets reflects a broader trend of seeking higher yields amid fluctuating economic conditions.

data.title: Abu Dhabi Investment Authority Unit Invests in Asian Private Debt Firm
data.description: A unit of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority has made an investment in Dignari, an Asian private debt firm. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the investment as a sign of continued interest in private debt assets despite ongoing global market uncertainties. This move reflects the authority's strategic focus on diversifying its portfolio and maintaining its commitment to the asset class amid fluctuating economic conditions.

data.title: India Seeks Safe Passage for Tankers Through Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced discussions with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian regarding the "serious situation in the region." Bloomberg posted on X that New Delhi is exploring options to ensure the secure transit of tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. The strategic waterway is crucial for global oil shipments, and tensions in the area have raised concerns about maritime security. Modi's engagement with Iran highlights India's proactive approach to safeguarding its energy interests amid regional instability.

data.title: XRP Spot ETFs Experience Significant Outflows
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on March 12, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $6.08 million. The largest outflow was from the 21Shares XRP ETF (TOXR), which recorded a single-day net outflow of $3.09 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $17.89 million. The Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ) followed with a net outflow of $2.99 million, while its historical total net inflow stands at $322 million. As of the latest report, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs is $968 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.15%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $1.208 billion.

data.title: Binance to List Katana (KAT) with New Spot Trading Pairs
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to list Katana (KAT) and open trading for new spot trading pairs on 2026-03-18 at 13:00 (UTC). The new pairs include KAT/USDT, KAT/USDC, and KAT/TRY. Users can begin depositing KAT one hour before trading starts, with withdrawals available from 2026-03-19 at 13:00 (UTC). The listing fee for Katana is set at 0 BNB. Additionally, 150,000,000 KAT will be allocated for future marketing campaigns, with further details to be announced separately. KAT will initially be available on Binance Alpha, but once spot trading commences, it will no longer be showcased there, and its trading volume will not contribute to Binance Alpha Points.

For Binance Alpha users, key highlights include the ability to transfer KAT from Binance Alpha Accounts to Spot Accounts 15 minutes before spot trading begins. KAT will be delisted from Binance Alpha upon the opening of spot trading on Binance Spot. Users can still view their KAT balance on Binance Alpha Accounts and transfer them to Spot Accounts for continued trading. Binance will facilitate the transfer of KAT from users’ Binance Alpha Accounts to Spot Accounts within 24 hours. Binance Alpha serves as a pre-listing token selection pool, and once a project is listed on Binance Spot, it will no longer be showcased on Binance Alpha.

Spot Algo Orders will be enabled for the new pairs at 2026-03-18 13:00 (UTC), with Trading Bots & Spot Copy Trading activated within 24 hours of listing. Users can include pairs in their Spot Copy Trading portfolios by adjusting the [Personal Pair Preference] section. Katana is a DeFi-focused blockchain aimed at providing deep liquidity and native yield. It is marked with a Seed Tag, indicating higher volatility and risk. Users must pass quizzes every 90 days to trade tokens with Seed Tags, ensuring awareness of associated risks. Trading eligibility is subject to regional restrictions, with certain countries unable to participate. The list of restricted countries may change due to legal and regulatory updates.

data.description: 1. A whale accumulated 73,744 ETH in 3 days, with a floating profit of $4.04 million; 2. CNN: Senior US government officials did not expect Iran to block the Strait of Hormuz; 3. Iran claims that resistance forces shot down a US refueling plane, killing all crew members; 4. A user lost approximately $50 million in a single transaction due to slippage; the founder of Aave stated that the platform had issued multiple warnings; 5. Trump will host a luncheon for Trump holders, with himself and 18 "superstar" guests in attendance; 6. A newly created wallet withdrew 200,000 SOL from Binance 9 hours ago and then staked it; 7. Iran claims that Trump's tweets will not end the war; 8. Ethena plans to adjust the sUSDe unstaking cooldown period to a dynamic mechanism, reducing it to as short as 1 day; 9. VeryAI completed a $10 million seed round of financing, led by Polychain Capital; 10. A whale deposited funds into Hyperliquid in the past 2 hours. 5.6 million USDC were used to short oil.

data.title: STOCKS | Japanese Government Bonds Decline Amid Inflation Concerns and Mideast Tensions
data.description:
Japanese Government Bonds (JGBs) experienced a decline as inflation concerns continue to weigh on the market. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the impact of ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East on investor sentiment. The conflict has exacerbated fears of rising inflation, prompting investors to reassess their positions in JGBs.

The market's reaction reflects broader concerns about the potential for increased inflationary pressures, which could lead to tighter monetary policies. Analysts suggest that the situation in the Middle East may contribute to volatility in global markets, influencing bond yields and investor strategies.

As investors navigate these uncertainties, the focus remains on how central banks might respond to inflation dynamics. The Bank of Japan's stance on monetary policy will be closely watched, as any shifts could further impact JGB yields.

Overall, the interplay between geopolitical developments and inflation concerns continues to shape market movements, with investors remaining cautious amid the evolving landscape.

data.title: BYD Explores Canadian Plant and Potential Global Automaker Acquisition
data.description: BYD, China's leading car manufacturer, is contemplating the establishment of a production facility in Canada. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the company is also evaluating the possibility of acquiring a well-established global automaker. This strategic move aligns with BYD's efforts to expand its international presence and enhance its competitive edge in the global automotive market. The potential Canadian plant would mark a significant step in BYD's expansion strategy, reflecting its ambition to strengthen its footprint beyond China. Meanwhile, the consideration of acquiring a global automaker underscores BYD's intent to leverage existing expertise and market reach to accelerate its growth trajectory.

data.title: Earthquake of Magnitude 5.3 Hits Near Erbaa, Turkey
data.description: An earthquake with a magnitude of 5.3 occurred 16 kilometers east of Erbaa, Turkey, as reported by the United States Geological Survey. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the seismic event's impact on the region. The earthquake's epicenter was located at a shallow depth, which can often result in more significant shaking and potential damage. Authorities are assessing the situation to determine the extent of any damage or injuries. The region is known for its seismic activity, and residents are advised to stay alert for any aftershocks.

data.title: Oil Prices Decline Amid Technical Correction Expectations
data.description: Oil prices experienced a slight decrease, attributed to a potential technical correction in the market. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting that analysts anticipate a short-term adjustment following recent gains. The market has seen fluctuations due to various factors, including geopolitical tensions and economic indicators. Traders are closely monitoring these developments to gauge future price movements. Despite the current dip, the overall outlook for oil remains influenced by broader economic conditions and supply chain dynamics.

data.title: U.S. Defense Department Underestimated Strait of Hormuz Blockade Risk
data.description: A recent report highlights that the U.S. Department of Defense and the National Security Council underestimated the risk of Iran potentially blockading the Strait of Hormuz during military operation planning. According to NS3.AI, the report indicates that the administration did not fully consider the consequences of such a blockade, describing it as a worst-case scenario.

data.title: Futures Market Sees Significant Liquidations Amid Volatility
data.description: Major exchanges experienced futures liquidations amounting to $102 million in the past hour. According to NS3.AI, the total futures liquidations over the past 24 hours reached $259 million, highlighting the ongoing volatility in the market.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Open Lower as Hang Seng Index Drops 0.52%
data.description: Hong Kong's stock market opened with declines, as the Hang Seng Index fell by 0.52% and the Hang Seng Tech Index decreased by 0.42%. According to Jin10, Li Auto (02015.HK) shares dropped 1.71% following its latest earnings report. The market's opening reflects investor sentiment amid ongoing economic uncertainties.

data.title: SEC commissioners call for simplified disclosure rules and focus on regulatory issues surrounding tokenized securities.
data.description: The difficulty in obtaining clear information has led Peirce to suggest that the SEC consider streamlining related rules. Peirce also addressed the issue of tokenized securities, stating that SEC staff are working on a potential "innovation exemption" mechanism that would allow limited experimentation with tokenized securities within the existing securities law framework. She also questioned whether tokenized securities require additional disclosure and intermediary requirements, noting that blockchain systems can achieve faster settlement speeds and, in some cases, bypass traditional intermediaries to complete transactions. Previously, SEC Chairman Paul Atkins stated that he considered tokenization a major financial innovation that regulators should encourage. The SEC issued a no-action letter to the DTCC last December, allowing it to explore blockchain-based securities tokenization services.

data.title: A certain whale accumulated 73,744 ETH in 3 days, with a floating profit of $4.04 million.
data.description: According to AI's monitoring, a certain whale has withdrawn a total of 73,744 ETH from Kraken since March 11th, including a further withdrawal of 10,421 ETH just 9 hours ago, worth $21.59 million. This whale (0x8E34...4170) currently holds a total value of $152 million, with an average withdrawal price of $2,072.2, resulting in a floating profit of $4.04 million.

data.title: Currency Exchange Rates: RMB Experiences Mixed Movements Against Major Currencies
data.description:
The Chinese yuan (RMB) has shown varied performance against major global currencies. According to Jin10, the USD/RMB rate increased by 48 points to 6.9007, indicating a depreciation of the yuan. Meanwhile, the EUR/RMB rate decreased by 166 points to 7.9402, and the GBP/RMB rate fell by 203 points to 9.2022. The AUD/RMB rate saw a significant drop of 370 points to 4.8788, and the CAD/RMB rate decreased by 111 points to 5.0544.

In contrast, the RMB appreciated against the Russian ruble, with the RMB/RUB rate rising by 502 points to 11.5506. The RMB also gained against the Malaysian ringgit, with the RMB/MYR rate increasing by 6.8 points to 0.56979. However, the JPY/RMB rate decreased by 55 points to 4.3284, and the CHF/RMB rate fell by 427 points to 8.7736. The SGD/RMB rate also saw a decline of 120 points to 5.3901.

These fluctuations reflect the ongoing volatility in the foreign exchange market, influenced by various economic factors and geopolitical developments.

data.title: Crude oil prices fell slightly, while precious metals rose.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $5,112.65 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.66%. Silver prices rose to $84.937 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.32%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 54.78, a daily increase of 1.14%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 74.40, a daily increase of 0.68%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.01% to 6.88095. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.14% to 159.115. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 1.14% to 5,726.62 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 0.51% to 10,286.17 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 0.37% to 23,593.08 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 1.03% to $95.36 per barrel, and Brent crude oil fell 1.06% to $100.37 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Crypto stocks generally retreated at the close of trading in the US, with Coinbase falling 2.72%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.56%, the S&P 500 fell 1.52%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 1.78%. Most crypto stocks weakened, with Solana falling 4.57%, Coinbase falling 2.72%, Bitmine falling 2.38%, SharpLink falling 1.45%, and Strategy (MSTR) falling 0.72%; while Circle bucked the trend, rising 1.21%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: French Soldier Killed in Iraq's Erbil
data.description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced that a French soldier has been killed in Erbil, Iraq. According to Jin10, the incident marks a significant event as France continues its military involvement in the region. The circumstances surrounding the soldier's death have not been fully disclosed, but it highlights the ongoing risks faced by military personnel stationed abroad. France has been actively participating in operations against various militant groups in the Middle East, and this tragic event underscores the challenges and dangers associated with such missions. Further details are expected to emerge as investigations proceed.
